{{Quote|Grassers, great six-limbed behemoths, tear down the jungle with their forehands and massive jaws.|Mace Windu (allegedly), ''[[The Private Journals of Mace Windu]]''|<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>}}
'''Grassers''' were six-[[Limb/Legends|legged]], three-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] herbivorous [[ungulate]]s native to [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. They were the main transportation of the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] in the jungle, and were protected by [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]]. Growing as large as two tons in mass, they provided [[Milk/Legends|milk]] (which could be used to make a hard [[Cheese/Legends|cheese]]) and were also used to make smoked meat. They ate [[portaak leaf]], [[glass-fern]], [[thyssel bark]], and [[brassvine]] thorns.

As of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], they had been bred for 700 generations.
